inferenceHeader.value: Inference Parameters

maxSamples.label: Maximum Samples
maxSamples.name: max_samples
maxSamples.help: Limit the number of samples processed

maxLength.label: Max Output Length
maxLength.name: max_length
maxLength.help: Maximum number of tokens to generate

showAdvancedInference.label: Show Advanced Generation Parameters
showAdvancedInference.name: show_advanced_inference
showAdvancedInference.help: Configure temperature, top-k, top-p, and batch size

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.name: temperature
temperature.help: Controls randomness in generation (0.0 = deterministic, 1.0 = random)

topK.label: Top K
topK.name: top_k
topK.help: Number of highest probability tokens to keep for filtering

topP.label: Top P (Nucleus Sampling)
topP.name: top_p
topP.help: Cumulative probability threshold for nucleus sampling

customInferenceParams.label: Custom Inference Parameters
customInferenceParams.name: custom_inference_params
customInferenceParams.help: Advanced generation parameters in JSON format (e.g., do_sample, repetition_penalty, pad_token_id)
